violations.finding: Direct python3 call without venv activation: 'python3 - "$QA_PATH" "$MODE" <<'PYEOF''. Although the embedded Python code only uses stdlib (json, os, sys), Standard 3 requires all Python invocations to use 'source venv' or 'source .venv' with no stdlib-only exception.
violations.recommendation: Activate venv before calling python3: 'source venv/bin/activate || source .venv/bin/activate && python - "$QA_PATH" "$MODE" <<'PYEOF'', or extract the inline Python to a dedicated script in scripts/ and invoke it through venv.

standards_checked.no-inline-code: pass — these are .sh scripts, not command/agent .md files; standard does not apply
standards_checked.no-hardcoded-values: pass — all scripts parameterize variable values via CLI args (--session-id, --mode, --source-command, positional $1) and env vars (CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, CLAUDE_SESSION_ID) with no hardcoded paths or URLs
standards_checked.integer-step-numbering: pass — no decimal or letter-based step numbering found in any file
standards_checked.meaningful-naming: pass — all four filenames describe their function clearly (update-gitignore, update-overnight-state, write-codex-enforce, write-qa-mode)
standards_checked.english-only: pass — no Chinese or non-English characters found
standards_checked.merge-similar-scripts: pass — write-codex-enforce.sh and write-qa-mode.sh have distinct purposes (codex enforcement flag vs QA mode sentinel); no merge warranted
standards_checked.concise-documentation: pass — scripts have concise header comments, not verbose markdown
standards_checked.parameterized-scripts: pass — all variable values accept parameters; update-gitignore.sh uses ${1:-.}, update-overnight-state.sh uses --session-id/--project-dir, write-codex-enforce.sh uses --source-command/--session-id, write-qa-mode.sh uses --session-id/--mode
standards_checked.dangling-references: pass — all four scripts exist on disk and are correctly referenced from commands/dev.md, commands/dev-overnight.md, commands/dev-command.md, commands/clean.md, agents/cleaner.md
standards_checked.merge-conflicts: pass — no unresolved merge conflict markers found

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed the draft violation is accurate: write-qa-mode.sh:26 directly invokes python3; use-source-venv requires all Python invocations to use source venv/source .venv with no stdlib-only exception; critical severity is correct; no missed critical violations found for the other three scripts. CODEX_FEEDBACK was empty (no issues flagged).
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: No changes made — Codex confirmed all findings and found no false positives, missed violations, or severity mis-classifications.
